zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset於1421年4月出生在英國薩默塞特豪德斯同時，他的父親Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon29歲，母親Elizabeth Stourton25歲。他和Alice Stourton至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1493年9月8日在英國薩默塞特享年72歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪索姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset was born in April 1421, in Houndstone, Somerset, England, his father, Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Stourton, was 25. He had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Alice Stourton. He died on 8 September 1493, in Somerset, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Somme, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset est né en avril 1421, à Houndstone, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stourton, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Alice Stourton. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1493, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Somme, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset im April 1421 in Houndstone, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stourton 25. Er hatte mit Alice Stourton mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 8. September 1493 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Somerset, England und wurde in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Alice Stourton. Morì il 8 settembre 1493, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Somme, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somersetが1421年4月にイギリスソメルセトホーウンドストーンで生まれた時，父Sheriff Robert Hill of Devonは29歳，母Elizabeth Stourtonは25歳であった。彼はAlice Stourtonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1493年9月8日にイギリスソメルセトで72歳で死去し，フランスピカーディソンメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset(이)가 1421년 4월 영국 서머세트 허운드스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stourton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Alice Stourton(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1493년 9월 8일 영국 서머세트에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 솜에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset родился апрель 1421 г. в местности хоундстоун, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stourton, 25. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Alice Stourton. Он умер 8 сентября 1493 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция.
